_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of control system technologies, such as Programmable Logic Controllers (PLCs), Supervisory Control and Data Acquisition (SCADA) software, Distributed Control Systems (DCS) and Operational Technology (OT).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of metadata types (business, technical, operational, process) and the systems and methods used to collect, store, and maintain each type.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-K-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AG-K-006 (AG, cosine: 0.492), RM-K-008 (RM, cosine: 0.481).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.6/10 (raw 0.359). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, operational, systems]. DCWF-only terms [acquisition, control, controllers, data, dcs, distributed] vs WIDAI-only terms [business, collect, maintain, metadata, methods, process] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.846 (P=0.825, R=0.869). R exceeds P by 0.044 — the WIDAI KSA's 21 words are well-captured by the DCWF element's 26 words, but the DCWF element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.2%, N:59.6%, C:40.2%). No dominant classification for "Knowledge of control system technologies, such as Programmable Logic Controllers" vs "Knowledge of metadata types (business, technical, operational, process) and the" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.507 > STS 0.359 (gap +0.148). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge, operational, systems] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.5%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, operational, systems]. DCWF-only: [acquisition, control, controllers, data, dcs, distributed]. WIDAI-only: [business, collect, maintain, metadata, methods, process].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.148 suggests some vocabulary-driven inflation in candidate selection.
